description: What Quandalf receives at session start. Keeps context lean.

briefing_packet_queries.active_blacklists: SELECT * FROM trade_blacklist WHERE active=1 AND expires_iso > datetime('now')
briefing_packet_queries.regime_state: SELECT * FROM market_confidence ORDER BY ts_iso DESC LIMIT 5
briefing_packet_queries.unapplied_lessons: SELECT * FROM lessons WHERE applied_in IS NULL ORDER BY ts_iso DESC LIMIT 5
briefing_packet_queries.recent_refinements: SELECT * FROM refinements ORDER BY ts_iso DESC LIMIT 3

on_demand_via_sqlite: Full backtest history for specific strategy
